title: The Surge Pattern — Reading the Crowd
description: From the front ranks, pressed against the turnstile, you begin to feel the rhythm of the crowd behind you. The Druckwelle comes in waves — each surge slightly stronger than the last, each recovery slightly shorter. You have been in enough demonstrations to know what this means: the crowd is not surging randomly. It is synchronizing. In approximately fifteen to twenty minutes, if nothing changes, the synchronization will produce a surge that the turnstile cannot absorb. The gate will not be pushed open — it will be pushed off its hinges. Anyone standing at the front when that happens will be crushed against the concrete frame.
